title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 01 2022
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 01 2022
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 01 2022
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 01/07/2022
DCE iron ore was was shocked and continued downward all the day.The main contract closed at 747.5,decreased of 6.85%. Traders aregenerally motivated to ship, steel mills are mainly on the sidelines, and there are few transactions in the market.PBF at Shandong port dealt 808 -825yuan/mt,decrease 30-47 yuan/mt compare with yesterday. SSF at Shandong port dealt 705 yuan/mt,decrease 20yuan/mt compare with yesterday.
